panels.title: TTFT p95
panels.description: TTFT p95. Main query: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(vllm:time_to_first_token_seconds_bucket{instance=~"$vllm_instance"}[5m])))

panels.title: E2E p95
panels.description: E2E p95. Main query: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(vllm:e2e_request_latency_seconds_bucket{instance=~"$vllm_instance"}[5m])))

panels.title: Core latency p50/p95
panels.description: Core latency p50/p95. Main query: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le) (rate(vllm:time_to_first_token_seconds_bucket{instance=~"$vllm_instance"}[5m]))); histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(vllm:time_to_first_token_seconds_bucket{instance=~"$vllm_instance"}[5m])))

panels.title: Per-token latency
panels.description: Per-token latency. Main query: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le) (rate(vllm:request_time_per_output_token_seconds_bucket{instance=~"$vllm_instance"}[5m]))); histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(vllm:request_time_per_output_token_seconds_bucket{instance=~"$vllm_instance"}[5m])))

panels.title: Cache hit ratio and scheduler pressure
panels.description: Cache hit ratio and scheduler pressure. Main query: 100 * sum(rate(vllm:prefix_cache_hits_total{instance=~"$vllm_instance"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum(rate(vllm:prefix_cache_queries_total{instance=~"$vllm_instance"}[5m])), 1e-9); 100 * sum(rate(vllm:external_prefix_cache_hits_total{instance=~"$vllm_instance"}[5m])) / clamp_min(sum(rate(vllm:external_prefix_cache_queries_total{instance=~"$vllm_instance"}[5m])), 1e-9)

panels.title: GPU utilization by GPU
panels.description: GPU utilization by GPU. Main query: avg by (gpu) (DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_UTIL{instance=~"$gpu_instance"})

panels.title: GPU memory used by GPU
panels.description: GPU memory used by GPU. Main query: DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{instance=~"$gpu_instance"}; DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE{instance=~"$gpu_instance"}

panels.title: GPU temperature by GPU
panels.description: GPU temperature by GPU. Main query: DCGM_FI_DEV_GPU_TEMP{instance=~"$gpu_instance"}

panels.title: GPU power by GPU
panels.description: GPU power by GPU. Main query: DCGM_FI_DEV_POWER_USAGE{instance=~"$gpu_instance"}

panels.title: GPU mem util avg
panels.description: GPU mem util avg. Main query: 100 * sum(DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{instance=~"$gpu_instance"}) / clamp_min(sum(DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_USED{instance=~"$gpu_instance"} + DCGM_FI_DEV_FB_FREE{instance=~"$gpu_instance"}), 1e-9)

panels.title: Est. GPU BW B/s
panels.description: Est. GPU BW B/s. Main query: sum(rate(vllm:estimated_read_bytes_per_gpu_total{instance=~"$vllm_instance"}[5m])) + sum(rate(vllm:estimated_write_bytes_per_gpu_total{instance=~"$vllm_instance"}[5m]))

panels.title: Host load
panels.description: Host load. Main query: node_load1{instance=~"$node_instance"}; node_load5{instance=~"$node_instance"}
Can exceed 100 if the process uses more than one CPU core.
panels.title: vLLM process CPU %
vLLM process file descriptors
panels.description: vLLM process file descriptors. Main query: process_open_fds{instance=~"$vllm_instance"}; process_max_fds{instance=~"$vllm_instance"}

panels.title: Filesystem usage % by mountpoint
panels.description: Filesystem usage % by mountpoint. Main query: 100 * (1 - node_filesystem_avail_bytes{instance=~"$node_instance",fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay|squashfs|ramfs|nsfs",mountpoint!~"/run.*|/var/lib/docker/.+"} / node_filesystem_size_bytes{instance=~"$node_instance",fstype!~"tmpfs|overlay|squashfs|ramfs|nsfs",mountpoint!~"/run.*|/var/lib/docker/.+"})

panels.title: TCP backlog / retransmit signals
panels.description: TCP backlog / retransmit signals. Main query: node_netstat_Tcp_CurrEstab{instance=~"$node_instance"}; sum(rate(node_netstat_TcpExt_ListenDrops{instance=~"$node_instance"}[5m]))

panels.title: HTTP server latency p50/p95/p99
panels.description: HTTP server latency p50/p95/p99. Main query: histogram_quantile(0.50, sum by (le) (rate(http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{instance=~"$vllm_instance"}[5m]))); histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{instance=~"$vllm_instance"}[5m])))

panels.title: vLLM target up
panels.description: vLLM target up. Main query: max(up{instance=~"$vllm_instance"})

panels.title: Node exporter up
panels.description: Node exporter up. Main query: max(up{instance=~"$node_instance"})

panels.title: DCGM exporter up
panels.description: DCGM exporter up. Main query: max(up{instance=~"$gpu_instance"})

panels.title: vLLM engine sleep state
panels.description: vLLM engine sleep state. Main query: max(vllm:engine_sleep_state{instance=~"$vllm_instance"})
Peak = max over selected time range.
